_doc: Configuration for checks/check.mjs. denylist: retired facts that may never return in any scanned text file, add the OLD wording whenever a fact changes (see AGENTS.md conflict rule). Each entry: pattern (JS regex source, case-insensitive), why (shown on failure), optional exclude (path substrings to skip). docs/decisions/, archives and checks/ are never scanned by the denylist (decision records may quote retired wording). styleBans: AI-boilerplate phrases banned in all text (prose-style check, decision 0008); same shape as denylist, seeded with high-confidence tells, extend per project. The prose-style check also bans AI typography (em dash, en dash, ellipsis and curly quotes) with no config needed; escape a deliberate case with checks:allow-style on the line. extraTextExtensions/extraCodeExtensions: the stack skill adds this ecosystem's file types here. codeFileCapExclude: path prefixes/suffixes the code-file-cap check skips (generated or vendored code); a checks:allow-length: <reason> line inside the file works too. skipSymlinkCheck: set true only on Windows without symlink support.

denylist.why: retired manifest wording; the decision-record note no longer carries a number range (it went stale at 0009)
retired explainer heading counts; headings stay numberless, the hero stat strip owns live counts (drifted once: heading said 14 while check.mjs had 17)
retired stat-strip count: 15 recorded decisions exist since 0015; bump the strip when a decision lands, until the counts are derived (GAP Phase 3)
wrong EAA date that once stood in the register: pre-2025 service contracts run until 2030-06-28 at the latest (EAA Art 32(2), verified 2026-07-22), no EU/NL deadline exists on 2027-06-28
retired NIS2 register wording; the Cyberbeveiligingswet is in force 2026-08-15, the register row owns the current status
retired AI Act citation; the omnibus amendment was signed 2026-07-08 (OJ publication pending), the register row owns the current citation
retired 0001 claim; since agent-file-cap the scheme is two-tier: working budget 150 for AGENTS.md, hard cap 200 for every agent rulebook file
retired ingest snippets; install/CLI/API syntax is read from the markitdown README at use time (skill-author: no code snippets that go stale)

styleBans.why: AI-tell verb; say 'look at', 'go into' or just state the point
marketing filler; describe what actually happens
filler throat-clearing; state the fact directly
filler; cut it or say what you mean
hype word; state the concrete effect
AI-tell flourish; say what it shows
hype phrasing; describe the capability plainly
